title: deer-flow.bus.subscription.error v1
description: Default failure channel for BaseBusConsumer subclasses (packages/harness/deerflow/bus_consumer_base.py, emit_error()) that don't declare their own error_channel. Emitted when a bus consumer's dispatch handler raises. Never raises itself — swallowed at the call site.

consumer.description: Name of the bus consumer instance that failed (BaseBusConsumer._name).

event_channel.description: Channel of the event being handled when the failure occurred, or the consumer's subscription_glob if unavailable.

subject.description: CloudEvents subject of the event being handled, if any.

error_type.description: Caller-supplied short category for the failure.
